items.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.dek: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.body: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: His gut produces alcohol spontaneously. For years, he was dismissed as an alcoholic
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll, reports say
items.dek: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.
items.body: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.
items.author: IriLine Desk
